title: Puerto Banus Stag: Private Yacht Charter Guide, Costs & Tips 2026
html:
For a private yacht charter stag in Puerto Banus, you can expect to pay from 2,500 EUR for a half-day bespoke trip on a Fairline Targa 43 departing from Marina del Sur. BoatHire24 connects you directly with skippers and owners for a seamless booking experience.

How much does it cost to charter a private yacht for a stag in Puerto Banus?

A crewed motor yacht for a stag party in Puerto Banus costs from 2,500 to 6,000 EUR for a half-day or full-day charter, depending on boat size and itinerary. You can book a boat online through BoatHire24, comparing prices and inclusions across verified listings. Extras such as a DJ, catering or water toys typically add 300â800 EUR.

Where to set off for a stag yacht charter in Puerto Banus

Your stag charter can depart from several real marinas and ports around Puerto Banus. The main departure points include Marina del Sur, the central Puerto Banus marina, Marbellaâs Club del Mar, Estepona marina, and Sotogrande harbour. Each offers easy access to the Mediterranean, with Marbella and Estepona providing shelter for a relaxed start.

A typical stag itinerary cruises west towards the bay of Estepona or east past Marbella to Cabo Pino, covering 15 to 25 nautical miles. Some charters head across to the North African coast for a truly memorable day on the water.

Which boat to rent for a stag party in Puerto Banus

The best boat for a stag party depends on your group size and budget. Consider these popular options:

  1. Motor Yacht (e.g. Fairline Targa 43) â Ideal for up to 12 guests, suitable for partying and day cruising, from 2,500 EUR half-day. View this motor yacht for full specs and availability on BoatHire24.
  2. Flybridge Cruiser (e.g. Azimut 50) â Spacious upper deck, great for socialising, up to 14 guests, from 3,500 EUR half-day.
  3. Catamaran (e.g. Lagoon 450) â Stable platform, wider beam, perfect for lounging, up to 12 guests, from 3,000 EUR half-day.
  4. Open Sports Boat (e.g. Axopar 28) â Fast, nimble and fun, suitable for up to 8 guests, from 1,800 EUR half-day.

Rental costs for stag yacht charters in Puerto Banus

Prices in Puerto Banus vary by vessel type, duration and level of service, but expect to pay several thousand euros for a private stag charter. Here is a typical price-band breakdown:

  • Shared tour on a sailing yacht: from 150 EUR per person for a 3-hour group trip; less private but still great fun.
  • Small motorboat (up to 6 guests) half-day self-drive with no skipper: from 600 EUR; may require a licence.
  • Catamaran full-day private charter for 12 guests with skipper: from 4,500 EUR, including fuel and basic catering.
  • Crewed luxury motor yacht (e.g. Sunseeker 60) full-day for up to 20 guests: from 6,000 EUR with full crew and premium bar.

Do you need a licence to rent a yacht for a stag in Puerto Banus?

If you charter a boat with a skipper (the usual arrangement for a stag party), no personal licence is required; the skipper operates the vessel. For bareboat (self-drive) rentals, operators typically demand an ICC or equivalent, but they confirm exact requirements per boat.

Book a late-evening slot during July and August to watch the sunset over the Mediterranean after a day of watersports â Giraldi wind often picks up in the afternoon, making the return leg smooth and scenic.

At a glance

  • Price band: 2,500 â 6,000 EUR for a private stag charter
  • Peak months: June to September
  • Trip length: 4 hours (half-day) or 8 hours (full-day)
  • Capacity: 8 to 20 guests depending on vessel
  • Currency: EUR (euros)

Questions about boat rental in Puerto Banus

Can I bring my own food and drink on a private yacht charter?

Most skippers allow you to bring your own food and drink, though some charters include catering in the price; check the listing or ask the owner directly on BoatHire24.

Is fuel included in the charter price?

Fuel is often included for half-day or full-day charters, but for longer trips or high-performance boats it may be charged extra; confirm with the operator before booking.

What time do stag charters typically start in Puerto Banus?

Morning starts (10:00 or 11:00) are common for a full day, while afternoon starts (15:00) suit a sunset party; you can agree a flexible schedule with the skipper.

How many people can I bring on a stag yacht in Puerto Banus?

Capacity ranges from 8 to 20 guests depending on the boat, with a maximum of 12 being typical for most motor yachts; check the vesselâs official capacity on the listing.

BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Puerto Banus or list your own. Whether you are organising a stag or a family day out, you can browse the listings to find the perfect vessel. If you own a boat in the area, consider listing it to reach thousands of potential guests for the 2026 season.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Puerto Banus and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
